summary.en: Angola does not operate an EU-style EMC directive, but motor-driven tools, electronic speed controllers, chargers, and power supplies are expected to limit electromagnetic disturbance and have adequate immunity. The practical route is IEC-based EMC evidence aligned with the IANORQ-adopted standard framework, supported at import inspection. For cordless tools that contain a radio module, EMC sits alongside the separate INACOM radio-approval obligation. Test configuration should reflect the actual marketed system, including charger and battery pack.
summary.zh: 安哥拉没有欧盟式的 EMC 指令，但电机驱动工具、电子调速器、充电器和电源应限制电磁骚扰并具备足够抗扰度。实务路径是与 IANORQ 采用的标准框架一致的基于 IEC 的 EMC 证据，并在进口检验中提供支持。对于含无线电模块的无绳工具，EMC 与独立的 INACOM 无线电核准义务并行。测试配置应反映实际销售系统，包括充电器和电池包。
summary.zht: 安哥拉沒有歐盟式的 EMC 指令，但電機驅動工具、電子調速器、充電器和電源應限制電磁騷擾並具備足夠抗擾度。實務路徑是與 IANORQ 採用的標準框架一致的基於 IEC 的 EMC 證據，並在進口檢驗中提供支援。對於含無線電模組的無繩工具，EMC 與獨立的 INACOM 無線電核准義務並行。測試配置應反映實際銷售系統，包括充電器和電池包。

standards_or_laws: IEC EMC standards (emission and immunity) as adopted under the IANORQ framework
INACOM radio approval for cordless tools containing a radio module (EMC is separate from radio approval)

summary.en: China compliance packages may include EMC reports alongside GB/T 3883 safety reports, often based on GB EMC standards that track IEC. For Angola, the limits, configuration, worst-case operating modes, charger inclusion, and the standard edition still need review against the IANORQ-adopted framework and the import-inspection expectations.
summary.zh: 中国合规包可能在 GB/T 3883 安全报告之外包含 EMC 报告，通常基于与 IEC 对应的 GB EMC 标准。对于安哥拉，限值、配置、最不利工况、是否包含充电器以及标准版本仍需对照 IANORQ 采用的框架及进口检验预期进行复核。
summary.zht: 中國合規包可能在 GB/T 3883 安全報告之外包含 EMC 報告，通常基於與 IEC 對應的 GB EMC 標準。對於安哥拉，限值、配置、最不利工況、是否包含充電器以及標準版本仍需對照 IANORQ 採用的框架及進口檢驗預期進行覆核。

standards_or_laws: China GB EMC standards and test reports where applicable

gap.en: A frequent gap is an EMC report that tests only the bare tool while omitting the charger, battery pack, or electronic-controller variants, plus uncertainty over which standard edition Angola accepts. The Angola file should show the exact marketed configuration, map evidence to the IANORQ-adopted EMC framework, and keep EMC distinct from the INACOM radio approval for cordless tools.
gap.zh: 常见差距是 EMC 报告只测试裸工具，而遗漏充电器、电池包或电子控制器变体，且对安哥拉接受的标准版本存在不确定性。安哥拉文件应显示实际销售配置，将证据映射到 IANORQ 采用的 EMC 框架，并使 EMC 与无绳工具的 INACOM 无线电核准相区分。
gap.zht: 常見差距是 EMC 報告只測試裸工具，而遺漏充電器、電池包或電子控制器變體，且對安哥拉接受的標準版本存在不確定性。安哥拉文件應顯示實際銷售配置，將證據映射到 IANORQ 採用的 EMC 框架，並使 EMC 與無繩工具的 INACOM 無線電核准相區分。

target.en: Practical expectation: IEC-based EMC evidence consistent with the IANORQ-adopted framework and accepted at import inspection. Angola has no EU-style standalone EMC directive; obligations flow from national adoption, import-conformity controls, and, for radio modules, INACOM rules.
target.zh: 实务预期：与 IANORQ 采用框架一致、并在进口检验中被接受的基于 IEC 的 EMC 证据。安哥拉无欧盟式独立 EMC 指令；义务来自国家采用、进口符合性管控，以及（对于无线电模块）INACOM 规则。
target.zht: 實務預期：與 IANORQ 採用框架一致、並在進口檢驗中被接受的基於 IEC 的 EMC 證據。安哥拉無歐盟式獨立 EMC 指令；義務來自國家採用、進口符合性管控，以及（對於無線電模組）INACOM 規則。

cn.en: China domestic files may include EMC evidence under GB EMC standards, but Angola acceptance depends on scope, limits, configuration, and standard edition.
cn.zh: 中国境内文件可包含基于 GB EMC 标准的 EMC 证据，但安哥拉接受性取决于范围、限值、配置和标准版本。
cn.zht: 中國境內文件可包含基於 GB EMC 標準的 EMC 證據，但安哥拉接受性取決於範圍、限值、配置和標準版本。

source.publisher: International Electrotechnical Commission (IEC) — EMC standards basis for IANORQ-adopted framework

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Angola-ready until EMC evidence covers the actual marketed tool system, is mapped to the IANORQ-adopted IEC EMC framework, and, for cordless tools with a radio module, is kept separate from the INACOM radio approval. China GB EMC reports support but do not by themselves confirm Angolan acceptance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在 EMC 证据覆盖实际销售工具系统、映射到 IANORQ 采用的 IEC EMC 框架，并对含无线电模块的无绳工具与 INACOM 无线电核准相区分之前，不能视为安哥拉就绪。中国 GB EMC 报告可作支持，但本身不确认安哥拉接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在 EMC 證據覆蓋實際銷售工具系統、映射到 IANORQ 採用的 IEC EMC 框架，並對含無線電模組的無繩工具與 INACOM 無線電核准相區分之前，不能視為安哥拉就緒。中國 GB EMC 報告可作支援，但本身不確認安哥拉接受。
